name: exceed-admin
description: Give Claude access to the Exceed admin API — search endpoints, inspect schemas, and execute API calls

exceed_domain.title: Exceed Domain
exceed_domain.description: Your Exceed domain URL (e.g., https://mycompany.exceedlms.com or https://intellum.exceedlms.com)

exceed_token.title: Exceed OAuth Access Token
exceed_token.description: OAuth access token for the Exceed admin API. Get one by running the /exceed-admin:exceed-login skill, then paste the value here.
